cards.text: kalau sayang sedih, baby pun rasa sedih jugak. 🥺
cards.sub: you don't have to carry it alone — i'm right here with you.

cards.text: it's okay to not be okay today, sayang. 🤍
cards.sub: your feelings are valid. every single one of them.

cards.text: baby nak cakap — you matter sangat sangat to me. 💛
cards.sub: even on your quietest days, especially on those days.

cards.text: if worlds heavy sangat, kamu always ada bahuu baby untuk sandar 🫂
cards.sub: i'm sorry for the times i made things heavier instead of lighter.

cards.text: sayang dont sedih okay. if sedih, my ws is always waiting for your chats.
cards.sub: chatt jee okeyy cinter

cards.text: nampak sayang happy, baby pun happy gila! 😊
cards.sub: your smile is literally my favourite notification.

cards.text: keep shining sayang, you deserve every good thing. ✨
cards.sub: the world is so much brighter when you're in a good mood.

cards.text: baby suka sangat tengok you glowing macam ni. 💛
cards.sub: save this feeling — you earned every bit of it.

cards.text: your happiness is my happiness too, always. 🌸
cards.sub: thank you for letting me be part of the good days.

cards.text: hihi, baby wish you always in happy condition. no matter what are you going through we must hadapi together
cards.sub: jangan hadap sorang sorang tauuuu

cards.text: kamu tak pernah alone pun, i akan sentiasa ada dalam hati kamu 🤍
cards.sub: i love you every seconds time is ticking

cards.text: baby faham sometimes you just need space. 🌙
cards.sub: but just know — my heart is still on your side, always.

cards.text: jauh ke dekat ke, sayang still dalam hati baby. 💛
cards.sub: distance doesn't change how much you mean to me.

cards.text: kalau rasa sunyi, close your eyes — i'm there. 🫂
cards.sub: you've never been someone i forget. not even for a second.

cards.text: aloo awak lonelyy ke ni sampai buka mood ni. awak kan always ada muhammad. even dia tak chat kamu tapi dia sentiasa ingat kamu tau.
cards.sub: dia busy work je tuu

cards.text: it's okay to be angry sayang. baby faham. 🤍
cards.sub: you don't have to pretend you're fine for my sake.

cards.text: kalau sayang marah baby, muhammad minta maaf sangat 🥺
cards.sub: you had every right to feel that way. no excuses from me.

cards.text: take your time. baby akan tunggu, no pressure. 🌸
cards.sub: i'd rather you be honest than polite with me.

cards.text: even when you're upset, i still choose you. 💛
cards.sub: not because it's easy — because you're worth it, sayang.

cards.text: hm janganla marah pasal cerita fav kamu tu. i dont mean it to forget, sebab baby penat kut.
cards.sub: zikry minta maaf sangat

cards.text: muhammad rindu kamu setiap hari, jam, minit and even setiap saat sayang 💛
cards.sub: jarak maybe kita jauh tapi hati kitaa sentiasa dekatt kann

cards.text: ldr memang susah sayang, tapi you worth every single mile. 🌙
cards.sub: i'd choose you again — even with the distance.

cards.text: setiap malam before tidur, baby ingat muka kamu. 🤍
cards.sub: that's my favourite part of the day — thinking of you.

cards.text: one day kita akan berjumpa juga oke sayang, sabarr tauuu 🫂
cards.sub: this distance is temporary. us is not.

cards.text: kamuu rindu kee, hihi. sokay im here. i know kamu rindu nak tengok i depan depan because muhammad oso rindu giler nak mati nak tengok kamu depan depan.
cards.sub: nantii oke bila ade rezeki
